# Landroid Cloud Assistant

This file configures the AI assistant for the Landroid Cloud Home Assistant integration.

## About

This is the Home Assistant integration for Worx Landroid lawn mowers. The assistant helps with:
- Bug fixes and feature development
- Issue triage and reproduction
- Code reviews and improvements
- Documentation updates

## Context

- **Language:** Python (Home Assistant custom component)
- **HA Core Version:** 2024.x+
- **PyWorxCloud:** Used as the underlying API library

## Quick Links

- [Issues](https://github.com/MTrab/landroid_cloud/issues)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/MTrab/landroid_cloud/discussions)
- [Home Assistant Community](https://community.home-assistant.io)

## Common Tasks

When fixing bugs:
1. Check if the issue reproduces with the latest version
2. Look at the diagnostics file for device state
3. Test changes in a development environment before submitting PR
